---

<!-- ABOUT THE ORG -->
<details>
<summary align="center"><b>ūüŹ≠ About Botman's Printing Paradise</b></summary>
<br>
<div align="center">

ūüĖ®ÔłŹ &nbsp; **Botman's Printing Paradise** &nbsp; ūüĖ®ÔłŹ

**Open source 3D printing firmware, profiles, configs & community resources**

---

ūüĒß &nbsp; Firmware configs ¬∑ Marlin & Klipper

ūüéõÔłŹ &nbsp; Filament & printer profiles ¬∑ OrcaSlicer, Elegoo Slicer, PrusaSlicer & Cura

ūüďź &nbsp; Calibration scripts ¬∑ pressure advance, flow, temp towers

‚öôÔłŹ &nbsp; Klipper macros ¬∑ PRINT_START, PRINT_END, bed mesh & more

ūüďĄ &nbsp; Start/End GCode libraries for every machine

ūüďö &nbsp; Step-by-step guides & community documentation

---

ūüĆć &nbsp; *Open source ¬∑ Community driven ¬∑ Precision engineered*

ūüßĶ &nbsp; *Open an issue ‚ÄĒ we don't bite, we only extrude*

</div>
</details>

---

<!-- WHAT WE MAINTAIN -->
<details>
<summary align="center"><b>ūüď¶ What You'll Find in Our Repos</b></summary>
<br>
<div align="center">

| ūüĒß Category | ūüďĀ What's Inside |
|:---:|:---:|
| **Firmware** | Marlin configs, Klipper `printer.cfg` files |
| **Slicer Profiles** | OrcaSlicer, Elegoo Slicer, PrusaSlicer & Cura filament and print profiles |
| **Filament Profiles** | PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, TPU, Nylon, PA-CF and more |
| **Calibration** | Pressure advance, flow rate, temperature towers, retraction scripts |
| **Macros** | Klipper macros (PRINT_START, PRINT_END, filament change, bed mesh) |
| **GCode** | Start/End GCode snippets for OrcaSlicer, Elegoo Slicer, PrusaSlicer & Cura |
| **Guides & Docs** | Step-by-step tuning guides, community wikis |

</div>
</details>

---

---

<!-- HOW TO CONTRIBUTE -->
<details>
<summary align="center"><b>ūü§Ě How to Contribute</b></summary>
<br>
<div align="center">

Got a printer profile, filament profile, Klipper macro, or firmware config worth sharing? We want it.

**1.** Fork any repo in this org
**2.** Add your profiles/configs in the appropriate folder
**3.** Document what printer, filament, and slicer version it targets
**4.** Open a Pull Request ‚ÄĒ it'll be reviewed fast

Have a feature idea, bug report, or just want to say hi?
Open an [issue](https://github.com/botmans-printing-paradise) ‚ÄĒ we don't extrude hot air, we actually respond. ūüĖ®ÔłŹ

</div>
</details>

</details>
<br>
